channel.title: Murmur
channel.description: Updates for Murmur, private on-device speech-to-text for macOS.

item.title: Version 0.4.0
item.description:
Stability and privacy fixes from a full code audit.

  • Meeting hotkey default is now ⌥⌘E (plain ⌘E collided with "Use Selection for Find").
  • Quitting with ⌘Q now cleanly stops an in-progress meeting recording.
  • Dictated text no longer ends up in clipboard-manager history.
  • Failed speech-model loads (for example, the first run while offline) now retry instead of silently sticking.
  • An unreadable recordings journal is backed up instead of being overwritten.
  • The shortcut recorder no longer lets you bind a bare letter or Space, which would have swallowed that key everywhere.
  • Deleting a single recording from Recently Deleted now asks for confirmation.
  • Video files are no longer offered for import (they always failed to transcribe).
  • Faster launches: transcripts and the index are no longer rewritten on every start.
